title: adhatoda decussata
intro: Adhatoda decussata, also known as Nilgiri or Vasa, is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Adhatoda decussata include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve heart health. Adhatoda decussata is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves are also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to make various formulations, including decoctions, powders, and ointments.
